plugin.lab.boundary.description: This Lab proves the App Host is removable without leaking experiment state into product paths.
plugin.lab.boundary.noRegistry: Does not write to command, skill, artifact, or workspace global registries.
plugin.lab.boundary.noRuntime: By default, App UI bundles, workers and workflows do not run; workflow entries must use the App Server Workflow API.

plugin.lab.description: The Lab connects Plugin package review, cache verification, installed state, setup, permissions, launch, App Manager, and cleanup preview without entering the production path.

plugin.lab.readiness.description: P15 explains host and setup gaps; the sample setup is Lab-only and never writes to a real workspace.

plugin.lab.run.adapterDescription: P2 validates the real adapter boundary for storage, Artifact, and Evidence through a local adapter store. It still does not execute App UI or workers.
